profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Quantum Clovera Investama Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in business activities in the fields of technology and digital services in Indonesia. It operates through Financial and Investment; and Technology and Digital segments. The company offers clean energy products and services, digital wholesale services, content entertainment products, digital product aggregation services, digital cloud advertising, and IoT products. It is also involved in the trading of marketable securities; underwriting activities; the sale of digital products through integrated engagement platforms; printing activities; the trade of telecommunications equipment and machinery; information technology and computer services; software publishing, e-commerce, and other computer programming activities; the production of household electrothermal equipment; retail trade through media for food, beverages, tobacco, chemical, pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and laboratory equipment; computer consulting; and facility management activities. In addition, it engages in land transportation, workshop, and agriculture activities, advertising, and the rental of electric vehicles. The company was formerly known as PT Kresna Graha Investama Tbk and changed its name to PT Quantum Clovera Investama Tbk in July 2023. PT Quantum Clovera Investama Tbk was founded in 1999 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
